scripts.modernization:audit-evidence-rust: node scripts/modernization/export-datasets.mjs && cargo run -q -p maldives-research-cli -- audit-evidence docs/modernization/baselines/datasets/research.json docs/modernization/baselines/datasets/sources.json --mode research --json
scripts.modernization:source-coverage-rust: node scripts/modernization/export-datasets.mjs && cargo run -q -p maldives-research-cli -- source-coverage-audit docs/modernization/baselines/datasets/research.json docs/modernization/baselines/datasets/sources.json docs/research-program
scripts.modernization:refresh-person-dossiers-ru: node scripts/modernization/export-datasets.mjs && cargo run -q -p maldives-research-cli -- refresh-person-dossiers docs/modernization/baselines/datasets/research.json docs/modernization/baselines/datasets/sources.json .
scripts.modernization:refresh-derived-dossiers-r: node scripts/modernization/export-datasets.mjs && cargo run -q -p maldives-research-cli -- refresh-derived-inference-dossiers docs/modernization/baselines/datasets/research.json docs/modernization/baselines/datasets/sources.json .
scripts.modernization:refresh-curated-dossiers-r: node scripts/modernization/export-datasets.mjs && cargo run -q -p maldives-research-cli -- refresh-curated-inference-dossiers docs/modernization/baselines/datasets/research.json docs/modernization/baselines/datasets/sources.json .
scripts.modernization:verify: node scripts/modernization/export-datasets.mjs && node scripts/modernization/export-raw-datasets.mjs && node scripts/modernization/check-parity.mjs && node scripts/modernization/verify-rust-derive-parity.mjs && cargo run -q -p maldives-research-cli -- qa-ledgers docs/modernization/baselines/datasets/research.json docs/research-program/ledgers && node scripts/modernization/verify-rust-qa-batch-content-parity.mjs && node scripts/modernization/verify-rust-reconcile-parity.mjs && node scripts/modernization/verify-rust-audit-evidence-parity.mjs && node scripts/modernization/verify-rust-source-coverage-parity.mjs && node scripts/modernization/verify-rust-refresh-relationship-quality-parity.mjs && node scripts/modernization/verify-rust-sync-inference-notes-parity.mjs && node scripts/modernization/verify-rust-refresh-person-dossiers-parity.mjs && node scripts/modernization/verify-rust-refresh-derived-dossiers-parity.mjs && node scripts/modernization/verify-rust-refresh-curated-dossiers-parity.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/modernization/verify-ts-search-engine-parity.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/modernization/verify-ts-pathfinder-parity.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/modernization/verify-ts-relationships-parity.mjs
